name: Harren
description: The oldest master on the Forge Council. Hasn't left Thornwall in forty years. His daughter died of a fever that southern medicine could have treated. He knows this. It hasn't changed his position on trade — it's hardened it. He believes accepting help from people who bring guards to a negotiation is the first step to losing everything. Makes the best steel on the mountain. Hasn't taken an apprentice in seven years because none of them meet his standard.
